title: Mitigate Race Conditions in State Transitions
description: Mitigate race conditions in state transitions by implementing "First-Write-Wins" and "Last-Write-Wins" strategies. Utilize versioned state containers to manage concurrent updates and maintain data integrity.
objectives: Mitigate race conditions in state transitions by implementing "First-Write-Wins" and "Last-Write-Wins" strategies.
Utilize versioned state containers to manage concurrent updates and maintain data integrity.
